response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some experience with experimentation platforms, but lacks direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems.
strengths: Experience with full-stack development and various technologies
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: No direct experience in AI-first growth and experimentation systems
Limited experience with large-scale distributed systems
Lack of direct experience with experimentation/measurement platforms

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in AI-first growth systems
